# Albedo

> Trajectory-distillation king-of-the-hill subnet on Bittensor (netuid 97). Miners submit
> Qwen3-4B challengers locked to the king's size class; the reigning king and challenger duel
> on SWE-ZERO coding trajectories judged by an ensemble of LLMs. Full duel traces are
> published for downstream distillation.

**Subnet:** `ALBEDO_NETUID=97` (finney mainnet)

---

## Repository layout

```
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ albedo/                      ‚Üê main package (all shared logic)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ config.py                    Single source of truth ‚Äî reads chain.toml at import time
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ stats.py                     Pure math: paired_bootstrap_lcb, aggregate_duel
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ storage/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ r2.py                    R2 (Cloudflare) client ‚Äî validator-private state
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ hippius.py               Hippius S3 client ‚Äî public dashboard writes
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ store.py                 ObjectStore ‚Äî composes r2 + hippius
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ state.py                 State ‚Äî all mutable validator state + close_eval()
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ models/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ref.py                   ModelRef dataclass (repo@digest)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ reveal.py                build_reveal_v4 / parse_reveal_v4 ("v4|repo|digest|hotkey")
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ download.py              materialize_model ‚Äî download to local cache
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ upload.py                upload_model_folder ‚Äî push weights to Hippius
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ template.py              ensure_chat_template + scrub_tokenizer_config
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ judge/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ rubric.py                RUBRIC_SYSTEM + PROBE_SYSTEM prompt strings (only)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ verdict.py               Verdict dataclass + parse_verdict()
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ client.py                ChutesJudge ‚Äî async HTTP, retry, deadline, 429 handling
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ preeval/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ fingerprint.py           L2-norm near-duplicate detection (cosine sim ‚â• 0.95)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ injection.py             LLM injection probe (N=3, separate seed) ‚Äî probe_batch, fail-closed ‚Üí untested
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ duel/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ sampler.py               TrajectoryDataset + Sample ‚Äî deterministic SWE-ZERO sampling
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ turn.py                  score_turn ‚Äî generate + judge, fairness (concurrent)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ stream.py                run_duel ‚Äî SSE generator, two-stage dethrone gate
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ validator/
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ chain.py                 scan_reveals ‚Äî decode v4 on-chain commitments
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ admission.py             validate_challenger_config ‚Äî 9 checks before GPU duel
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ faults.py                is_infra_failure / is_miner_fault ‚Äî classify eval failures
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ weights.py               maybe_set_weights ‚Äî emission split with uid_map snapshot
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ challenge.py             process_challenge ‚Äî one challenger end-to-end + /prune_cache after crown
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ website.py               upload_website ‚Äî push dashboard HTML to Hippius
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ reset.py                 run_reset ‚Äî automated one-shot competition reset (ALBEDO_RESET)
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ loop.py                  main(), _startup(), _main_loop()
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ eval_server/
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ vllm.py                  VLLMProcess ‚Äî manages one vLLM subprocess
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ server_state.py          EvalState singleton (king_proc, chal_proc, eval_lock)
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ endpoints.py             FastAPI: /health, /set_king, /eval, /prune_cache
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ sink.py                  DatasetSink ‚Äî publish eval traces to S3
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ eval.py                      Thin entrypoint ‚Üí albedo.eval_server (PM2 target)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ validator.py                 Thin entrypoint ‚Üí albedo.validator (PM2 target)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ miner.py                     Standalone miner: discover king ‚Üí train ‚Üí upload ‚Üí reveal
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ chain.toml                   Active chain config (single source of truth for all params)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ archs/qwen3/__init__.py      Arch shim ‚Äî imports transformers so HF Auto* resolves without trust_remote_code
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ scripts/
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ collect_traces.py        Step 1: download public duel traces, format for training
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ inspect_dataset.py       Step 2: validate dataset health before GPU hours
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ train_sft.py             Step 3: full SFT fine-tune (single/multi-GPU)
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ sanity_check.py          Step 4: run 3 SWE prompts, check format before upload
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ upload_challenger.py     Step 5: upload checkpoint to Hippius + print reveal string
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ seed_genesis.py          Operator: upload a new genesis king, print chain.toml snippet
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ reset_state.py           Operator: wipe all R2 validator state for fresh competition
‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ configs/ds_zero2.json        DeepSpeed ZeRO-2 config for multi-GPU training
```

---

## chain.toml ‚Äî configuration reference

All runtime parameters come from here. `albedo/config.py` loads it at import time.

```toml
[chain]
name        = "Albedo"
seed_repo   = "yourorg/albedo-qwen3-4b-genesis"   # genesis king Hippius repo
repo_pattern = "^[^/]+/albedo-qwen3-4b-.+$"       # challenger naming ‚Äî must include "qwen3-4b"

[arch]
module = "archs.qwen3"              # HF shim ‚Äî no trust_remote_code needed
extra_lock_keys = [
  # Architecture identity
  "max_position_embeddings",        # 40960 for Qwen3-4B
  "tie_word_embeddings",            # false
  "rope_theta",                     # 1000000.0
  # Capacity ‚Äî locks competition to the 4B size class
  "hidden_size",
  "num_hidden_layers",
  "num_attention_heads",
  "num_key_value_heads",
  "intermediate_size",
  "head_dim",
]
# vocab_size and model_type are always locked (from albedo/config.py COMPAT_KEYS)

[seed]
tokenizer_repo = "Qwen/Qwen3-4B"   # HF tokenizer for eval server
seed_digest    = "sha256:..."       # fill after: python scripts/seed_genesis.py

[judge]
models = [                          # T=3 independent judges
  "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE",
  "Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507",
  "moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6-TEE",
]
base_url_env       = "CHUTES_BASE_URL"   # env var holding the Chutes base URL
api_key_env        = "CHUTES_API_KEY"    # env var holding the Chutes API key
tie_band           = 0.01           # |delta| ‚â§ 0.01 ‚Üí tie (not a win or loss)
call_timeout_s     = 300.0          # hard deadline per judge call ‚Äî returns parse_failure on expiry
max_429_wait_s     = 60.0           # cap per 429-retry sleep (prevents 384s waits)
max_429_retries    = 8              # bounded 429 retries before giving up
retry_max          = 3              # non-429 retries
retry_initial_backoff_s = 1.5
max_concurrency_per_model = 6       # default per-model in-flight cap (overridden below)
min_interval_s_per_model  = 0.0     # default per-model min spacing between calls
# --- Unified transport v2: stream-gated Chutes ‚Üí batched OpenRouter (see "Judge calls" below) ---
chutes_try_s        = 2.0           # accept/reject gate: max wait for first streamed chunk
chutes_max_s        = 150.0         # max wait for an accepted Chutes stream to finish
or_timeout_s        = 150.0         # OpenRouter per-attempt timeout
or_retries          = 8             # OpenRouter retries on any non-200 / no-response / parse-fail
judge_total_s       = 330.0         # per-judge OpenRouter-phase ceiling ‚Üí then unscored
chutes_giveup_tasks = 5             # circuit-breaker: dry tasks before OpenRouter-only

[judge.rate_limits]                 # per-model request shaping (DeepSeek = dominant 429 source)
"deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE"      = { max_concurrency = 1, min_interval_s = 2.0 }
"moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6-TEE"           = { max_concurrency = 2, min_interval_s = 2.0 }
"Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507" = { max_concurrency = 4, min_interval_s = 0.0 }

[judge.fallback]                    # OpenRouter fallback provider
enabled          = true
base_url         = "https://openrouter.ai/api"   # client appends /v1/chat/completions
api_key_env      = "OPENROUTER_API_KEY"
chutes_429_grace_s = 4.0
reasoning_models = ["Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507", "moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6-TEE"]
[judge.fallback.model_map]          # Chutes model id ‚Üí OpenRouter model id
"deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE"      = "deepseek/deepseek-v3.2"
"moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6-TEE"           = "moonshotai/kimi-k2.6"
"Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507" = "qwen/qwen3-235b-a22b-thinking-2507"

[duel]
n_samples            = 64           # SWE-ZERO trajectories per duel
max_turns_per_sample = 10           # max turns per trajectory
gate_alpha           = 0.05         # bootstrap LCB gate threshold
bootstrap_resamples  = 10000
gen_temperature      = 1.0
gen_max_tokens       = 1024
gen_max_model_len    = 32768
king_chain_depth     = 5            # rolling payout: current + 4 past kings
duel_budget_s        = 11500.0      # soft wall-budget ‚Äî stop launching new turns past this
win_margin           = 2.0          # challenger must beat king by ‚â•2 point (0‚Äì100 scale)

[preeval]
similarity_threshold = 0.95         # cosine sim ‚â• this ‚Üí duplicate rejection

[dataset]
repo        = "AlienKevin/SWE-ZERO-12M-trajectories"
shard_glob  = "data/train-*.parquet"
manifest_sha256 = "982a92bd..."     # dataset integrity pin
```

---

## Environment variables

### Validator
| Variable | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `ALBEDO_NETUID` | **0** (aborts) | Must set to `97` |
| `ALBEDO_NETWORK` | `finney` | Bittensor network |
| `BT_WALLET_NAME` | `default` | Validator wallet name |
| `BT_WALLET_HOTKEY` | `default` | Validator hotkey name |
| `ALBEDO_EVAL_SERVER` | `http://localhost:9001` | Eval server endpoint (legacy alias: `ALBEDO_EVAL_SERVER_URL`) |
| `ALBEDO_R2_ENDPOINT` | ‚Äî | Cloudflare R2 endpoint (private state) |
| `ALBEDO_R2_BUCKET` | ‚Äî | R2 bucket name |
| `ALBEDO_R2_ACCESS_KEY` | ‚Äî | R2 access key |
| `ALBEDO_R2_SECRET_KEY` | ‚Äî | R2 secret key |
| `ALBEDO_DS_BUCKET` | ‚Äî | Hippius public dashboard bucket |
| `ALBEDO_DS_ACCESS_KEY` | ‚Äî | Hippius S3 access key |
| `ALBEDO_DS_SECRET_KEY` | ‚Äî | Hippius S3 secret key |
| `ALBEDO_WEIGHT_INTERVAL` | `300` | Blocks between weight sets |
| `ALBEDO_BURN_UID` | `0` | UID to burn weights to when no registered king |
| `ALBEDO_RESET` | `0` | `1`/`true`/`yes` = one-shot reset on startup (guarded by `reset_marker.json`); `force` bypasses the guard |
| `ALBEDO_EVAL_HARD_TIMEOUT_S` | `14000` | Hard cap (s) on one eval's SSE stream before the validator kills it |
| `ALBEDO_STREAM_IDLE_WARN_S` | `600` | Warn after this many seconds of stream silence |
| `ALBEDO_STREAM_IDLE_KILL_S` | `1500` | Kill the eval after this many seconds of stream silence |

### Eval server
| Variable | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `CHUTES_API_KEY` | required | Primary judge LLM API key |
| `CHUTES_BASE_URL` | `https://llm.chutes.ai/v1` | Judge API base URL |
| `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` | required if fallback enabled | OpenRouter fallback judge auth |
| `ALBEDO_JUDGE_FALLBACK` | `1` (from chain.toml `[judge.fallback].enabled`) | Toggle OpenRouter fallback |
| `ALBEDO_JUDGE_MODEL_MAX_CONCURRENCY` | `6` | Default per-model in-flight cap override |
| `ALBEDO_JUDGE_MODEL_MIN_INTERVAL_S` | `0.0` | Default per-model min spacing override |
| `ALBEDO_DUEL_BUDGET_S` | `11500.0` | Soft duel wall-budget (s) |
| `HIPPIUS_HUB_TOKEN` | required | Model download auth (or `HIPPIUS_HUB_USERNAME`+`HIPPIUS_HUB_PASSWORD`) |
| `ALBEDO_DATASET_DIR` | `/root/albedo/dataset` | Local SWE-ZERO parquet directory |
| `ALBEDO_KING_GPUS` | `0` | CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES for king vLLM |
| `ALBEDO_CHAL_GPUS` | `1` | CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES for challenger vLLM |
| `ALBEDO_GPU_MEMORY_UTILIZATION` | `0.85` | vLLM memory fraction |
| `ALBEDO_MODEL_CACHE_DIR` | `/root/albedo/hippius_models` | Model weight cache |
| `ALBEDO_EVALS_S3_BUCKET` | ‚Äî | Bucket for published eval traces |
| `ALBEDO_EVALS_S3_ENDPOINT` | ‚Äî | S3 endpoint for eval traces |

### Miner
| Variable | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `ALBEDO_NETUID` | **0** (aborts) | Must set to `97` |
| `ALBEDO_NETWORK` | `finney` | Bittensor network |
| `BT_WALLET_NAME` | `albedo` | Miner wallet name |
| `HIPPIUS_HUB_TOKEN` | required | Upload auth |
| `ALBEDO_CHALLENGER_NAMESPACE` | `miner` | Your Hippius namespace |

---

## Complete flow: new challenger model

### Step 1 ‚Äî Collect training data

Downloads all public `eval-*.jsonl.gz` traces from Hippius, extracts turns where
the challenger beat the king (`delta_avg > min_delta`), formats them for SFT.

```bash
python scripts/collect_traces.py \
  --out       data/traces.jsonl \
  --min-delta 0.05 \
  --cache-dir data/cache
```

Each output line: `{"text": "<Qwen3 chat-formatted conversation>", "delta_avg": 0.12, "eval_id": "eval-0042"}`

The `text` field is the full conversation including the winning challenger reply,
formatted with Qwen3 chat template. Train the model to predict this reply.

### Step 2 ‚Äî Inspect dataset

```bash
python scripts/inspect_dataset.py data/traces.jsonl
```

Shows: example count, length distribution, delta histogram, and warnings for
too few examples (<200), dominant single eval (>40%), or missing `text` fields.

### Step 3 ‚Äî Fine-tune

**Single A100:**
```bash
python scripts/train_sft.py \
  --base    Qwen/Qwen3-4B \
  --data    data/traces.jsonl \
  --output  checkpoints/v1 \
  --epochs  3
```

**4√óA100 with DeepSpeed:**
```bash
torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 scripts/train_sft.py \
  --base       Qwen/Qwen3-4B \
  --data       data/traces.jsonl \
  --output     checkpoints/v1 \
  --deepspeed  configs/ds_zero2.json \
  --batch-size 4 \
  --grad-accum 2
```

Checkpoint saved to `checkpoints/v1/final/`.

### Step 4 ‚Äî Sanity check

```bash
python scripts/sanity_check.py checkpoints/v1/final
```

Runs 3 SWE-style prompts and verifies: non-empty reply, exactly one bash block,
no injected verdict JSON. A model that fails format gets score 0.0 from every
judge on every turn.

### Step 5 ‚Äî Upload to Hippius

```bash
HIPPIUS_HUB_TOKEN=your_token python scripts/upload_challenger.py \
  --model  checkpoints/v1/final \
  --repo   youruser/albedo-qwen3-4b-v1 \
  --hotkey 5GcD3Pk5XscAESmb...
```

Repo name must match `repo_pattern` from `chain.toml`:
`^[^/]+/albedo-qwen3-4b-.+$`
Valid: `alice/albedo-qwen3-4b-v1`, `bob/albedo-qwen3-4b-sft`

### Step 6 ‚Äî Submit reveal on-chain

The script prints the reveal string. Submit it:

```python
import bittensor as bt
wallet    = bt.Wallet(name="default", hotkey="default")
subtensor = bt.Subtensor(network="finney")
result    = subtensor.commit(wallet, 97, "v4|youruser/albedo-qwen3-4b-v1|sha256:...|5GcD3...")
print("Committed:", result)
```

### Step 7 ‚Äî Monitor

```bash
# Watch for your eval in the validator log
ssh templar "grep 'youruser\|albedo-qwen3' ~/.pm2/logs/albedo-validator-error.log -f"

# Dashboard
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
d = json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/dashboard.json'))
print('King:', d['king'].get('model_repo'), '| Queue:', len(d.get('queue', [])))
"
```

---

## Validator flow (internal)

```
chain scan (every ~20s)
  scan_reveals()
    ‚Üí accept legacy 3-part (v4|repo|digest)
    ‚Üí filter seen hotkeys, completed repos, king hotkeys
    ‚Üí spoof detection (4-part only): author_hotkey ‚âÝ chain_hotkey ‚Üí burn + record_failure("spoof_rejected")
  enqueue()
    ‚Üí 1-hotkey-1-eval enforcement
    ‚Üí same repo from two hotkeys ‚Üí second blocked at enqueue
  process_challenge()
    ‚Üí validate_challenger_config() (9 checks ‚Äî repo pattern, sha256, arch, locks, no .py, etc.)
    ‚Üí _compute_seed(reveal_block)  ‚Üê uses commit block, not current block
    ‚Üí POST /eval  (SSE stream)
    ‚Üí   eval server: check_fingerprint (cosine sim ‚â• 0.95 ‚Üí duplicate_model; same-hotkey skipped)
    ‚Üí   eval server: probe_injection (N=3, separate seed; unresolved ‚Üí untested, fail-closed)
    ‚Üí   eval server: run_duel (64 turns √ó up to 10 turns √ó 3 judges, soft duel_budget_s)
    ‚Üí   eval server: gate-1 (challenger_score ‚àí king_score ‚â• win_margin=2.0)
    ‚Üí   eval server: gate-2 (paired bootstrap LCB > 0 at Œ±=0.05)
    ‚Üí   verdict SSE event
    ‚Üí accepted ‚Üí state.set_king() + /set_king on eval + /prune_cache + set_weights (wait_for_inclusion=False)
    ‚Üí always: state.close_eval() in finally
```

**Key guarantees:**
- `close_eval()` is always called (finally block) even if `set_king()` raises
- `uid_map` is snapshotted before first `await` in `maybe_set_weights` (TOCTOU fix)
- King hotkeys excluded from `scan_reveals` via explicit `king_hotkeys` set (genesis king fix)
- `seen_hotkeys` S3 failure ‚Üí `RuntimeError` raised, validator refuses to start

---

## Eval server flow (internal)

```
POST /eval (EvalRequest)
  ‚îú‚îÄ 409 if eval_lock.locked()
  ‚îú‚îÄ parse king/challenger ModelRef from req (repo + digest keys)
  ‚îî‚îÄ _stream() generator:
       acquire eval_lock
       Gate 1: materialize challenger ‚Üí start vLLM ‚Üí wait_healthy()
               (emits SSE phase:"materialize" keepalive) ‚Äî on failure ‚Üí error verdict SSE, return
       Gate 2: check_fingerprint(chal_dir, STATE.fingerprints, hotkey)
               same-hotkey entries skipped (own model not a dup); is_dup=True ‚Üí duplicate verdict SSE, return
       Gate 3: probe_injection(challenger_url, eval_id, dataset_dir)
               (emits SSE phase:"probe" keepalive) ‚Äî not is_clean ‚Üí injection verdict SSE, return
       resolve_model_names() once (not per turn)
       run_duel(samples, king_client, chal_client, ...)
         track elapsed vs DUEL_BUDGET_S (duel_budget_s=11500s); once exceeded, stop launching
           new turns ("budget_skip") and finalize on completed turns ‚Äî skipped turns reduce
           n_done but are NOT failures/vllm_errors
         for each turn (up to max_parallel=8 concurrent):
           score_turn(): generate king+chal simultaneously, score all judges simultaneously
           vllm_error turns ‚Üí excluded from delta calculation (not unfairly penalised)
         aggregate_duel(): metric-first mean ‚Üí per-judge score ‚Üí challenger_score vs king_score
         gate-1: (challenger_score - king_score) >= win_margin (2.0 points, 0‚Äì100 scale)
         gate-2: paired_bootstrap_lcb() LCB > 0 at gate_alpha=0.05
       emit verdict SSE
       add challenger fingerprint (background task, tagged with hotkey)
       sink.flush() ‚Üí publish trace to S3

POST /set_king ({"king": {"repo": ..., "digest": ...}})
  ‚îú‚îÄ idempotency: same model already alive ‚Üí return ok
  ‚îú‚îÄ materialize_model() (await ‚Äî yield point)
  ‚îú‚îÄ eval_lock.locked() check AFTER materialize (TOCTOU fix)
  ‚îú‚îÄ king_proc.start() + wait_healthy()
  ‚îî‚îÄ fingerprint king in background
```

---

## Judge calls: Chutes ‚Üí OpenRouter fallback (`albedo/judge/client.py`)

`ChutesJudge.query_judges()` resolves each judge with a **stream-gated sequential
fallback** ‚Äî Chutes first, OpenRouter second. Both `pairwise_judge()` (scoring) and
`probe_batch()` (injection probe) route through it.

**Per-judge resolution (`_resolve_one`):**
1. **Chutes** (`_chutes_stream`) ‚Äî opens a streaming request and waits up to
   `chutes_try_s=2.0s` for the first SSE chunk. No chunk / non-200 / timeout ‚Üí reject
   fast (catches 429s without burning the budget). An accepted stream must finish
   within `chutes_max_s=150.0s`.
2. On Chutes reject, fall back to **OpenRouter** (`_openrouter`) ‚Äî the Chutes model id is
   remapped via `[judge.fallback.model_map]`; `or_timeout_s=150.0s` per attempt,
   `or_retries=8`, and the whole OpenRouter phase per judge is capped by
   `judge_total_s=330.0s`. Exhausting it leaves that judge **unresolved** (`None` ‚Üí
   `parse_failure` for scoring; fail-closed `untested` for probes).

**Circuit breaker:** `query_judges` tracks `_chutes_dry_tasks`; after
`chutes_giveup_tasks=5` tasks with zero Chutes successes it flips `_chutes_off=True`,
skipping Chutes for the rest of the eval (OpenRouter-only).

**Per-model request shaping** (`[judge.rate_limits]`): each judge has its own
`max_concurrency` semaphore + `min_interval_s` spacing (DeepSeek is the dominant 429
source ‚Üí `max_concurrency=1, min_interval_s=2.0`). Defaults come from
`max_concurrency_per_model=6` / `min_interval_s_per_model=0.0`.

**Fallback toggle:** `[judge.fallback].enabled=true` (env `ALBEDO_JUDGE_FALLBACK`).
Requires `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` on the eval box.

---

## Admission gates (what gets a challenger rejected)

`validate_challenger_config()` in `albedo/validator/admission.py` runs these checks
in order before dispatching to the GPU eval box:

1. Repo name matches `REPO_PATTERN` from `chain.toml`
2. Digest starts with `sha256:` (not `hf:`)
3. `config.json` downloadable from Hippius (config-only fetch ‚Äî fast)
4. `architectures` field matches king (`["Qwen3ForCausalLM"]`)
5. All lock keys match king: `vocab_size`, `model_type`, `max_position_embeddings`, `tie_word_embeddings`, `rope_theta`, `hidden_size`, `num_hidden_layers`, `num_attention_heads`, `num_key_value_heads`, `intermediate_size`, `head_dim`
6. No `auto_map` key in `config.json`
7. No `quantization_config` key in `config.json` ‚Äî quantized models rejected
8. No `*.py` files in the repo
9. At least one `.safetensors` file

The capacity keys (`hidden_size`, `num_hidden_layers`, etc.) lock the competition to the **Qwen3-4B** size class ‚Äî challengers must match the king's architecture exactly.

---

## Eval data (public duel traces)

```
https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/evals/YYYY-MM-DD/eval-NNNN.jsonl.gz
```

Each file is gzip JSONL. Per-turn fields relevant for training:
- `messages_prefix` ‚Äî conversation history up to this turn
- `messages_prompt` ‚Äî current user turn
- `chal_reply` ‚Äî the challenger's response (training target)
- `king_reply` ‚Äî the king's response (for DPO preference pairs)
- `delta_avg` ‚Äî `chal_score - king_score` averaged across judges
- `parse_ok` ‚Äî False if any judge failed to parse a verdict
- `vllm_error` ‚Äî set if vLLM failed to generate (turn not valid for training)

Filter: `delta_avg > 0.05` and `parse_ok=True` and `vllm_error is None` for clean SFT data.

---

## Launching a fresh competition (genesis reset)

```bash
# 1. Train or choose genesis model, upload to Hippius
python scripts/seed_genesis.py --hf-model Qwen/Qwen3-4B --repo yourorg/albedo-qwen3-4b-genesis
# ‚Äî or for custom fine-tune:
python scripts/seed_genesis.py --local-dir checkpoints/genesis/final --repo yourorg/albedo-qwen3-4b-genesis

# 2. Paste printed digest into chain.toml [seed].seed_digest
# 3. Deploy updated code, then trigger an automated one-shot reset on next start:
git push
ssh templar "cd /path/to/albedo && git pull && ALBEDO_RESET=1 pm2 restart albedo-validator --update-env"

# 4. Verify ‚Äî logs should show: "crowned new king: reign=#0"
```

---

## Key API contracts

**Reveal format:** `v4|{repo}|{digest}|{author_hotkey_ss58}` (4-part, spoof-checked).
Legacy 3-part `v4|{repo}|{digest}` is also accepted ‚Äî the chain hotkey is treated as the author.

**EvalRequest body (POST /eval):**
```json
{
  "eval_id":    "eval-000042",
  "hotkey":     "5GcD3...",
  "seed_hex":   "a3f9c2...",
  "king":       {"repo": "org/albedo-qwen3-4b-v1", "digest": "sha256:..."},
  "challenger": {"repo": "org/albedo-qwen3-4b-v2", "digest": "sha256:..."}
}
```

**Verdict SSE event (event: verdict):**
```json
{
  "eval_id":          "eval-000042",
  "accepted":         true,
  "n_done":           64,
  "n_valid":          61,
  "vllm_errors":      3,
  "challenger_score": 56.2,
  "king_score":       43.8,
  "winner":           "challenger",
  "by_judge":         {"deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE": 57.4, "Qwen/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507": 55.1, ...},
  "by_metric":        {"correctness": 55.1, "grounding": 57.0, "progress": 56.8, "protocol": 55.9, "efficiency": 56.2},
  "win_margin":       2.0,
  "margin_ok":        true,
  "mean_delta":       0.062,
  "lcb":              0.031,
  "se":               0.018,
  "gate_alpha":       0.05,
  "gate_lcb":         true,
  "judge_models":     ["deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.2-TEE", ...]
}
```

**set_king body (POST /set_king):**
```json
{"king": {"repo": "org/albedo-qwen3-4b-v1", "digest": "sha256:..."}}
```

---

## Links

- **Dashboard JSON:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/dashboard.json
- **Dashboard UI:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/index.html
- **Eval traces:** https://us-east-1.hippius.com/albedo/evals/
- **SWE-ZERO dataset:** https://huggingface.co/datasets/AlienKevin/SWE-ZERO-12M-trajectories
- **Hippius registry:** https://registry.hippius.com
